changelog: Live radio added — PTT now transmits real audio to everyone in your channel.

notes: Live PTT radio — hold your push-to-talk key and your voice is transmitted to everyone in your channel in real time
Firebase audio relay — audio is streamed through Firebase Realtime Database, no peer-to-peer setup required
User cards now update live — see who is speaking with a green glow and Transmitting status
Sidebar shows all users currently in each channel, updating as they join or leave
Channel switching now reconnects the audio stream automatically
Mic captured at 8 kHz mono with mu-law compression for low-latency walkie-talkie quality
Discord OAuth2 login with avatar sync
Community join and create flow using invite codes
Push-to-talk keybind system (keyboard and mouse buttons)
Server owner tools — members list, kick, customize panel, rename channels
